associatedMedia.headline: Balnagown Castle, Kildary, Eastern Ross, Scotland
associatedMedia.description: Balnagown Castle is located beside the village of Kildary in Easter Ross, part of the Highland area of Scotland. There has been a castle on the site since the 14th century, although the present building was remodeled in the 18th and 19th centuries. Balnagown is the ancestral home of the Chiefs of Clan Ross.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet MacLean於1360年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie31歲，母親Christina MacLeod31歲。她於大約1380年與William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet MacLean于1360年出生在苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie31岁，母亲Christina MacLeod31岁。她于大约1380年与William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年在苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱享年49岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet MacLean was born in 1360, in Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, was 31 and her mother, Christina MacLeod, was 31. She married William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief about 1380, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1409, in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 49, and was buried in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet MacLean est née en 1360, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Christina MacLeod, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief environ 1380, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1409, à Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet MacLean 1360 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie 31 und ihre Mutter Christina MacLeod 31. Sie hat um 1380 in Scotland William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1409 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet MacLean è nata il nel 1360 nel Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Christina MacLeod, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief circa 1380, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1409, nel Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet MacLeanが1360年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuieは31歳，母Christina MacLeodは31歳であった。約1380年にスコットランドでWilliam Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chiefと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアイスル オフ スクイで49歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアイスル オフ スクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet MacLean(이)가 1360년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina MacLeod(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 스컷랜드에서 William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 이슬일 프 스카이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 이슬일 프 스카이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet MacLean nasceu em 1360, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Christina MacLeod, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief aproximadamente 1380, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1409, em Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet MacLean родилась в 1360 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Christina MacLeod, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief около 1380 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1409 г. в местности исл оф ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности исл оф ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet MacLean nació en 1360, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Christina MacLeod, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief aproximadamente 1380, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1409, en Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
